description: Database for game simulation containing maps, scenarios, and units

map.description: Map database with sector-based terrain information for various battlefield environments

scenario.description: Scenario database with game modes designed to assess different AI capabilities (Theory of Mind, Spatial Reasoning, Long-Term Planning)

unit.description: Armada faction unit database containing air, bot, building, defense, factories, hover, sea, and vehicle units

rule.description: Contains rule codes for game customization (e.g., spawn units, restrict targets, auto-construct buildings) and verification codes to validate that each rule works correctly

decision.description: Decision types that define available actions for AI agents in different scenarios

verify.description: Verification gadgets for testing game setup and unit behavior

rubric.description: Rubric database containing evaluation criteria for different stages of game generation
